serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display); spirited use ~10,000 km REC.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki 4 Series F32.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years after first change; garage.wiki F32 lists first change at 3 years.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki 4 Series F32.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km MFR: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki 4 Series; BMW TIS N55).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-f32/2015/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-f32/2015/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-f32/2015/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual F32
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-f32/2015/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-f32/2015/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change (60,000 km); BMW TIS N55
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
